# GitHub Copilot Instructions

When updating Markdown files in this repository, keep in mind that the content is compiled and published with MkDocs on GitHub Pages.

- Use MkDocs-compatible Markdown features.
- You may use supported MkDocs plugins like `mermaid2` if it improves page quality.
- Prefer clear headings, short sections, and well-structured docs.
- Keep filenames and paths consistent with the `mkdocs.yml` navigation structure.
- Avoid raw HTML unless it is necessary and compatible with MkDocs.
- Check that any diagrams or custom syntax render correctly in the MkDocs build.

> Note: This repository uses `ai-docs/mkdocs.yml` for site configuration, so documentation changes should align with that build setup.
